span.p: Was error budget exhausted in the last window?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Was the team able to act on the policy - freeze and fix?

span.p: Invest in reliability - do not loosen target yet

span.p: Has the system shipped risky changes freely without impact?

span.p: Consider loosening target - invest budget in velocity

span.p: Hold target - the caution is deliberate
